scope: xuan-owned code/profile/analyzer review only; no deploy, no restart, no raw/replay/collector scan

data_declaration.public_account_execution_truth_v1_includ: only in repair probe metadata/covered proxy; not private owner-trade truth

evidence_chain_available_now.market_depth_tick: MarketDataMsg::BookDepthTick carries market_side, best_bid, best_ask, best_bid_size, best_ask_size, best_bid_drop_qty, best_ask_drop_qty, event_time_ms, source_sequence_id
evidence_chain_available_now.dry_run_fill_source: FillSource::DryRunBookDepthTouch is emitted separately from book_touch and trade_sell_touch
evidence_chain_available_now.fill_event_payload: dry_run_touch_fill_confirmed includes source=book_depth_touch plus depth_best_bid, depth_best_ask, depth sizes, drop qty, event_time_ms, depth_source_sequence_id
evidence_chain_available_now.analyzer_taxonomy: analyze_pgt_shadow_events separates dry_run_touch_book_depth and market depth evidence counters
evidence_chain_available_now.unit_coverage: executor/analyzer tests cover source taxonomy and depth_source_sequence_id propagation

symmetric_admission_residual_stress.reason: At edge=0.07 and leak=0.005, covered worst_day=-6.44; at edge=0.08 and leak=0.01, holdout worst_day=-17.09

implementability_gaps.why: Current dry-run fill events record positive touch fills, but the artifacts do not expose a complete denominator of all placed/accepted/unmatched/canceled/expired first-leg maker quotes by condition_id/side/price/time.
minimum_evidence_needed: condition_id, side, price, size, placed_ts_ms, accepted_ts_ms, cancel_sent_ts_ms, cancel_ack_ts_ms, expiry_reason
matched_pair_id or opposite_trigger_ts_ms for symmetric pairings
unpaired_quote_count, unpaired_quote_size, leaked_fill_size, leaked_fill_cost by day/market/profile
source_sequence_id linkage from market_md depth event to fill event when fill source is book_depth_touch

implementability_gaps.why: Depth touch evidence can show best_bid/drop and simulated fill price, but current strategy artifacts do not yet prove the actual quote lifecycle earns public_trade_price-edge after queue/cancel latency.
minimum_evidence_needed: daily worst-case fee-after PnL segmented by price_improvement bucket
queue/depth source coverage for each fill

implementability_gaps.why: edge=0.07 inventory repair is stress-positive on public-covered aggregate but still relies on completion-store/public proxy evidence rather than private queue/source-of-truth fills, and uncovered 05-16/17 remains stress-negative.
minimum_evidence_needed: public_account_truth or private owner-trade truth for 2026-05-16/17/18
split metrics that remain stress-positive on covered and uncovered slices

decision.next_action: build or request a quote-lifecycle evidence artifact before any xuan-shadow smoke; if unavailable, continue local verifier work on reducing unmatched first-leg exposure
